sub_modules.fft16_index_gen: Combinational radix-2 DIT stage controller address generator for p, q, and twiddle indices.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 cosine and positive sine table entries.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_mode: Combinational mode adapter that conjugates the sine component for IFFT operation.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with rounded Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output normalizer that divides IFFT results by N=16 and leaves FFT results unscaled.
